---
title: "galah"
subtitle: Download Biodiversity Data from the GBIF Node Network
author: "Martin Westgate"
date: "2023-07-01"
categories: [data]
image: "logo.png"
---

`{galah}` is produced by the Atlas of Living Australia, and provides a tidy
syntax for downloading data from the ALA, GBIF, and other living atlases.
